series_metadata.series_title: IT Reports and Studies Support Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains support documents for published and internal IT reports and studies. Series includes policy recommendation memo, drafts, correspondence, research, working group rosters, minutes, surveys, reveiw drafts,and recommendations, and news releases.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in office area IT report or study it supports is superseded, obsolete or rescinded ; Paper: in office area IT report or study it supports is superseded, obsolete or rescinded
